title: TEDxGeorge is here in October!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - TEDxGeorge is thrilled to...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - TEDxGeorge is thrilled to announce its inaugural event, a gathering of the brightest minds and innovators to share ideas that can shape the future. Scheduled for October 5, 2024, from 9 AM at the Dotsure George Arts Theatre, this event marks the beginning of an annual tradition where thinkers and doers converge to explore a wide array of topics, from technology and entertainment to science, humanities, business, and development.


> Themed “The Brave Ones,” this event celebrates local heroes and heroines who have continuously taken bold steps in their respective fields.


These individuals may not always receive widespread recognition, but their impactful efforts are at the heart of their focus. By providing a platform for them to share their stories, activities, and future aspirations, they hope to inspire and empower others to reach their highest potential, despite the challenges they may face.

TED (Technology, Entertainment, Design) has become synonymous with ground-breaking ideas and inspirational talks. In the spirit of "ideas worth spreading," TEDxGeorge emerges as a local platform, part of the global TEDx program, where individuals can come together to share transformative ideas.

Leading up to their main event, they will host a series of “Salon” events—smaller, more intimate gatherings focusing on key topics in a relaxed setting. These events are free and open to the public, providing an excellent opportunity to build the TEDx community and prioritize engagement, idea-sharing, and empowerment. Over the next few months, these events will take place at various locations across the city, with the first kicking of this week, Thursday - 8 August at the George Museum, from 18:00 – 20:00. Follow their social media pages and visit their website to stay updated on the schedule and details.

At TEDxGeorge, attendees will experience a blend of TED Talks and live speakers, becoming part of an interactive community that fosters deep discussions and connections. These talks will not only entertain and inspire but also provoke thought and encourage action. Leveraging the TEDx platform, they aim to create a dynamic and engaging event that enriches lives and sparks positive change in our community and beyond.

Join them on this extraordinary journey of exploration, enlightenment, and collaboration. They seek to ignite the flame of inspiration and celebrate the limitless potential of human creativity. The event will be held on October 5, from 9 AM to 5 PM at the Dotsure George Arts Theatre (125 York St, George Central, George, 6529). Speakers will delve into a wide range of topics, from jazz and artificial intelligence to affordable healthcare, diversity, and more. Official information regarding ticket sales is available on their website - tedxgeorge.com

For more information about TEDxGeorge and how you can get involved, visit their website or follow them on social media (@tedxgeorge) on Facebook and Instagram.

TED is a non-profit, nonpartisan organisation dedicated to discovering, debating, and spreading ideas that spark conversation, deepen understanding, and drive meaningful change. People from every discipline and culture who seek a deeper understanding of the world and connection with others are welcomed, and invited to engage with ideas that build communities. TED began in 1984 as a conference where Technology, Entertainment, and Design converged, but today it spans a multitude of worldwide communities and initiatives exploring everything from science and business to education, arts, and global issues.

Follow them to stay up to date!

Flyer for upcoming TEDxGeorge Salon event.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
